data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Accessibility seating', which is mentioned in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the implementation or availability of accessibility seating in the system. The absence of API reads or persisted state checks to demonstrate this requirement is satisfied indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of accessibility seating.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
